name: pull-directory
label: Pull Directory
description: Pull user information from NACC directory and save to admin project
author: NACC

dry_run.description: Whether to do a dry run

user_file.description: The name for the directory user file

notifications_path.description: Parameter path for notification configuration (sender and support emails)

preceding_hours.description: Number of hours to look back from the current time for filtering records by last modification time. 0 means no filtering (full pull).
